attributes.description: Alerts when peak CPU utilization within a CloudWatch period exceeds a threshold, catching short-lived spikes that average-based rules may miss.
attributes.name: [AWS EC2 OTel] CPU utilization spike

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-aws.ec2.otel-*
| WHERE attributes.Namespace == "AWS/EC2"
    AND attributes.MetricName == "CPUUtilization"
    AND attributes.stat == "Maximum"
| EVAL ec2_instance = CONCAT(attributes.InstanceId, " (", resource.attributes.cloud.region, ")")
| STATS peak_cpu_pct = MAX(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUUtilization`) BY ec2_instance
// Peak threshold (%): tune per workload — Maximum stat detects spikes within each period
| WHERE peak_cpu_pct > 95.0
| SORT peak_cpu_pct DESC
| LIMIT 100
